<!-- What uncertainty or decision does this spike exist to resolve? -->

<!-- What will you know or be able to decide after this spike is done? -->

<!-- Maximum time allocated. e.g. 4 hours, 1 day -->

<!-- How will you investigate this? What will you read, build, or test? -->

<!-- What should be produced at the end? e.g. a written summary, a proof-of-concept, a decision recorded in the issue comments. -->


## 📝 Findings
<!-- Fill this in when the spike is complete. -->

<!-- What was decided as a result of this spike? -->
